title: oncidium × pulchellum subsp. concavum
intro: Oncidium × pulchellum subsp. concavum, also known as the 'Dancing Ladies' orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oncidium × pulchellum subsp. concavum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
